claims.public_claim: The repository defines 25 specialist SEO agents.
claims.required_proof: Canonical capability and runtime registries contain the same 25 agent names.
claims.approved_wording: The repository defines 25 specialist SEO agents.
claims.prohibited_wording: All 25 agents execute in every audit.

claims.public_claim: The flagship technical audit executes a governed multi-role workflow.
claims.required_proof: Contribution ledger, consumed stage handoffs, decisions, findings, and artifacts exist for the run.
claims.approved_wording: The flagship technical audit records seven deterministic specialist and governance contributions; this does not mean seven independent LLM calls.
claims.prohibited_wording: The command launches seven autonomous AI agents.

claims.public_claim: The system includes live-capable first-party and public integrations.
claims.required_proof: Implementation exists and each provider has authorized smoke evidence before being called verified live.
claims.approved_wording: Live-capable integrations are available when configured; fixture success is not live proof.

claims.required_proof: Observable CI, clean installation, vulnerability audit, authorized pilots, rollback, and independent reproduction.
claims.approved_wording: The project is under active product-proof and release validation.

claims.public_claim: The system is the best SEO agent system in the world or proven superior to claude-seo.
claims.required_proof: Blinded benchmark, required score and margin, no critical loss, two APPROVE_GREAT reviews, and independent reproduction.
claims.approved_wording: An evidence-governed SEO operating system under comparative validation.
claims.prohibited_wording: Best in the world or proven superior.

claims.public_claim: The flagship audit produces client and engineering deliverables.
claims.required_proof: Fixture and live run artifacts satisfy the artifact contract; only live runs may prove public-site execution.
claims.approved_wording: The flagship audit produces deterministic client and engineering artifacts; live-site proof requires a live authorized run.
claims.prohibited_wording: The fixture report proves real-site client readiness.
